description: H0: displayed group confidence now matches Evidence Status. A Direct or Development group classified FALLBACK_ONLY can no longer display Medium or High confidence — it is capped at 25/"Low" with an explicit driver explaining why. Trust/explainability fix only; the cap is applied after the blended confidence calculation has already read each group's raw score, so it cannot affect fair value, weighting, Evidence Status, or Recommendation.
changes_in_this_version: valuation_engine_v2.py: new _apply_confidence_status_cap(group) — the single implementation of the FALLBACK_ONLY confidence cap. If group.evidence_status == 'FALLBACK_ONLY': confidence_score = min(confidence_score, 25), confidence_label = 'Low', and a confidence_drivers entry is appended explaining the cap. EMPTY groups are left untouched (already 0/'None' from construction). STRONG/WEAK groups are untouched.

The cap is called from blend_evidence() on the direct and development group objects, AFTER _assess_blended_confidence() and the valuation_status mapping have already run — this was a deliberate placement decision, not the original one: applying the cap inside the group builders (build_direct_evidence_group / build_development_evidence_group) was tried first and found to leak into the blended confidence weighted-sum, which could cascade into final.valuation_status and therefore the Recommendation. Moving it to after blending made it genuinely display-only.

validate_baseline.py: added per-group confidence_label/confidence_score columns, and v1_recommendation_tagline/v2_recommendation_tagline columns, to the CSV/JSON schema — needed to verify this fix's before/after effect. Test-harness change only, not application logic.

validation.method: Full 20-property baseline re-run (validate_baseline.py) before and after, diffed field-by-field on v1_value, v2_value, v2_confidence_score, evidence status/weight/comp_count per group, plus a targeted raw-vs-capped comparison for all 8 FALLBACK_ONLY groups (obtained by temporarily monkeypatching the cap to a no-op).
validation.result: 20/20 properties succeeded. Fair values (V1 and V2) byte-identical to the CR1 baseline for all 20 properties. Final blended confidence_score/label unchanged (verified directly: Vyner Road stayed 44/"Medium" before and after). Evidence status totals unchanged: 26 STRONG / 13 WEAK / 8 FALLBACK_ONLY / 33 EMPTY. Reconciliation weights and comparable counts unchanged on every group, every property. All 8 FALLBACK_ONLY groups across the dataset had their displayed confidence capped to Low(25): Chestnut Close (Development, was Medium 43), Vyner Road South (Direct, was Medium 45; Development, was Medium 48), Dee Park Road (Development, was Medium 56), Acacia Grove (Development, was Medium 61), Bostock Road (Direct, was Medium 60; Development, was Medium 43), Bracken Close (Development, was Low 31, capped further to 25 for consistency).
